name: Shrimp Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixer bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the lemon juice.
3. Stir in the horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, chopped shrimp, pepper, green onions, and garlic powder.
4. Chill to blend flavors.
5. Garnish as desired.
6. Serve with crackers or fresh vegetables.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
